page.title: Notifications
page.subtitle: Catch up on account, run, and group updates from newest to oldest.
page.empty_description: Once FullParty has something to tell you, it will show up here.
page.mark_all_success_description: All notifications were marked as read.

notifications_updated.title: Notification settings updated
notifications_updated.body: Your notification preferences were updated. Changed preferences: {settings}

username_updated.title: Account settings updated
username_updated.body: Your account settings were updated. Changed settings: {settings}

privacy_updated.title: Privacy settings updated
privacy_updated.body: Your privacy settings were updated. Changed settings: {settings}

new_for_review.title: Applications waiting for review
new_for_review.body: {count} new applications for {activity} are waiting for review.

declined.title: Application declined
declined.body: Your application as {character} for {activity} was declined.
declined.body_with_reason: Your application as {character} for {activity} was declined. Reason: {reason}

cancelled.title: Application cancelled
cancelled.body: Your application as {character} for {activity} was cancelled because the run was cancelled.

roster_published_assigned.title: Roster published
roster_published_assigned.body: The roster for {activity} has been published. You are assigned to {slot} as {character}.

roster_published_bench.title: Roster published
roster_published_bench.body: The roster for {activity} has been published. You are on the bench as {character}.

assigned.title: Roster assignment updated
assigned.body: You are now assigned to {slot} for {activity} as {character}.

on_bench.title: Bench assignment updated
on_bench.body: You are now on the bench for {activity} as {character}.

returned_to_queue.title: Assignment returned to review
returned_to_queue.body: Your application for {activity} as {character} has been returned to the review queue.
